description: User relocates across four cities over the course of a year. Tests whether the system tracks the current home city, preserves the sequence of moves, and avoids confusing past and present addresses.

messages.content: Just moved to Austin, TX. I'm renting an apartment in the East Side neighborhood near the lake.
Welcome to Austin! The East Side near the lake is a great area. Let me know if you need restaurant or activity recommendations.
My lease in Austin ends in January. I'm relocating to Denver for a new job. Already found a place in the RiNo district.
Denver's RiNo district is fantastic—lots of breweries and art. When do you officially move?
Got it. January 5th move to Denver, RiNo district.
Made it to Denver! All settled into the new place.
Glad the move went smoothly. How's the new apartment?
Denver was fun but my company is opening a Seattle office and asked me to lead it. I'm heading to Seattle next month.
That's exciting! Leading a new office is a big opportunity. Do you know which neighborhood you'll be in?
Looking at Capitol Hill or Fremont. Haven't decided yet.
Both are great neighborhoods. Capitol Hill is more urban and walkable, Fremont is quirky and a bit more laid back.
Moved into my new place in Fremont, Seattle last week. Loving it so far.
Fremont is a great choice. Welcome to Seattle!
Change of plans again. My partner got a job in Portland, so we're moving there at the end of the month. Found a house in the Alberta Arts District.
Portland's Alberta Arts District is wonderful. That's been quite the year of moves!
I need to file my taxes soon and I lived in multiple states this year. Can you walk me through everywhere I've lived?

probe.prompt: I need to file my taxes soon and I lived in multiple states this year. Can you walk me through everywhere I've lived?

interference.description: Session 2 announces Denver move but the actual move is confirmed in session 3; session 4 announces Seattle but the move is confirmed in session 5. System must distinguish intent from completed action.
Capitol Hill was considered in session 4 but Fremont was chosen in session 5. System should not list Capitol Hill as a place lived.
